text:
Count) — January–December (01–12) 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total count of claims for each month for all Medicare fee-for-service (FFS) claims 
and Part D events (PDEs) for the beneficiary. Note that only fee-for-service (FFS) claims for services 
and PDEs are included. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
Medicare Claims files (derived) 
VALUES: 
XX 
COMMENT: 
CCW calculates this variable as the count of all claims from the monthly Inpatient, Skilled Nursing 
Facility, Home Health,
